story.iWant: build configuration để bundle extension và setup shared code access
story.soThat: extension can reuse frontend components và utilities

subtasks.subtask: Choose build tool: Webpack hoặc Vite (recommend Webpack for extension)
Create `extension/webpack.config.js` hoặc `extension/vite.config.ts`
Configure entry points: content-script, background, sidepanel
Configure output directory: `dist/`
Configure build mode (development/production)
Test build command runs successfully
Set output path to `extension/dist/`
Configure output filenames: `content-script.js`, `background.js`, `sidepanel.js`
Configure HTML output: `sidepanel.html` (if using HTML plugin)
Ensure dist directory structure matches manifest requirements
Test build outputs files correctly

task.title: Configure path aliases trong build tool

subtasks.subtask: Configure webpack resolve aliases: `@/*` → `../frontend/src/*`
Hoặc configure Vite alias: `@/*` → `../frontend/src/*`
Ensure aliases match TypeScript path config từ Story 10.1
Test alias resolution trong build process
Verify imports resolve correctly during build
Create test file trong extension: `extension/src/shared/test-import.ts`
Import `cn()` utility: `import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'`
Use `cn()` function trong test file
Run build và verify import resolves correctly
Verify no build errors related to path aliases
Test import works at runtime (if possible)
Run build command
Verify `dist/content-script.js` exists
Verify `dist/background.js` exists
Verify `dist/sidepanel.js` exists
Verify `dist/sidepanel.html` exists
Verify all files are properly bundled (check file sizes)
Test loading extension với built files
Test build command completes without errors
Verify all output files exist và are valid
Test path alias imports resolve correctly
Test shared code import works (cn() utility)
Verify build outputs match manifest.json references
Test extension loads với built files

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Webpack hoặc Vite configuration để build extension
Path aliases configured để import từ frontend (`@/components`, `@/lib`, etc.)
Shared code import test: successfully import `cn()` utility từ frontend

doc.title: Browser Extension Architecture - Suna.so
doc.snippet: Build Tool: Webpack hoặc Vite. Extension uses path aliases để import từ frontend codebase. Build outputs to dist/ directory.

doc.title: Browser Extension Architecture - Suna.so
doc.snippet: Build output structure: `dist/content-script.js`, `dist/background.js`, `dist/sidepanel.js`, `dist/sidepanel.html`. Build tool must support multiple entry points và path alias resolution.

doc.title: Suna.so Browser Extension - Epic Breakdown
doc.section: Story 10.3: Build Configuration & Shared Code Setup
doc.snippet: As a developer, I want build configuration để bundle extension và setup shared code access, So that extension can reuse frontend components và utilities. Acceptance criteria include build tool config, output directory, path aliases, shared code import test, và build outputs.

doc.title: Story 10.1: Extension Project Structure Setup
doc.snippet: TypeScript configuration với path aliases (`@/*` → `../frontend/src/*`) created. Package.json với dependencies matching frontend created. This story builds on that foundation.

doc.title: Story 10.2: Extension Manifest Configuration
doc.snippet: Manifest references built files: `content-script.js`, `background.js`, `sidepanel.html`. Build process must produce these files matching manifest references exactly.

file.reason: TypeScript path alias configuration. Build tool resolve aliases must match this config: `@/*` → `../frontend/src/*`.
Package.json với build scripts và dependencies. Build tool should be added as devDependency. Build script should output to dist/.
Manifest references built files. Build output must match these references: content-script.js, background.js, sidepanel.html.
Test import target. Create test file importing `cn()` from `@/lib/utils` để verify path aliases work correctly.
Reference for TypeScript compiler options. Extension build config should match frontend settings để ensure compatibility.

constraint.description: Webpack recommended for extensions (better extension-specific plugins). Vite also viable but may need more configuration. Must support multiple entry points, path aliases, TypeScript, React/JSX, và Tailwind CSS.
Build tool resolve aliases must match TypeScript path config: `@/*` → `../frontend/src/*`. Both configurations must be synchronized.
Build outputs to `extension/dist/` directory. Files must match manifest.json references exactly: content-script.js, background.js, sidepanel.js, sidepanel.html.
Build tool must support multiple entry points: content-script, background, sidepanel. Each entry point produces separate output file.
Must successfully import `cn()` utility từ `@/lib/utils` để verify path aliases work. This is critical test for code reuse capability.
Build must produce all required files: content-script.js, background.js, sidepanel.js, sidepanel.html. Files must be valid và loadable in Chrome extension.

interface.name: Webpack Configuration
interface.signature: webpack.config.js với entry points, output, resolve aliases

interface.name: Vite Configuration
interface.signature: vite.config.ts với entry points, build output, alias resolution

tests.standards: Testing standards: Run build command và verify completion without errors, verify all output files exist và are valid, test path alias imports resolve correctly, test shared code import works (cn() utility), verify build outputs match manifest.json references, test extension loads với built files. Use manual verification và build output inspection.

test.idea: Run build command (`npm run build`) và verify it completes without errors
Verify build tool configuration file exists và is valid (webpack.config.js hoặc vite.config.ts)
Verify `extension/dist/` directory is created after build
Check dist directory structure matches expected output
Create test file importing from `@/lib/utils` và verify build resolves import correctly
Verify no build errors related to path alias resolution
Import `cn()` utility trong test file và verify it compiles
Use `cn()` function trong test code và verify build succeeds
Verify `dist/sidepanel.html` exists và references sidepanel.js correctly
Load extension trong Chrome với built files và verify it loads without errors
